concerns.text: T038 'Code cleanup and refactoring for reproducibility' lacks concrete deliverable. What specific cleanup? What defines 'done'? Replace with specific refactoring tasks (e.g., 'Refactor validation.py to use logging module per Constitution I').

T015 'Implement source_reference validation to verify peer-reviewed/NIST provenance (FR-010)' does not name the artifact. Is this a separate module or part of clean_merge.py? Specify output file or function.

T034 'Implement R² > 0.5 performance target justification citing Smith et al. 2021 (FR-015, SC-003)' does not name the artifact. Is this a report section, code comment, or markdown file? Specify output location.

T039 'Performance optimization ensuring entire pipeline ≤ 5h on free-tier CI' is a constraint, not an implementable task. Replace with specific optimization tasks (e.g., 'Profile pipeline with cProfile and document bottlenecks in docs/performance.md').

T005 'Create data-model.md with PerovskiteStructure, ThermalProperty, StructuralDescriptor entities' conflicts with plan.md which shows data-model.md already exists in project structure. Either reference existing file or remove task.

T008 'Setup SHA-256 checksum tracking for raw data files (Constitution III)' does not specify where checksums are recorded. Constitution requires `state/projects/...yaml` artifact_hashes map. Specify exact file path.
T036 'Save all figures as high-resolution PNG files to figures/ directory' does not specify resolution. FR-012 requires high-resolution but does not define DPI. Specify minimum DPI (e.g., 300 DPI).

T035 'Add feature importance report generation (coefficients magnitude or permutation importance) (FR-011)' does not specify output format. FR-011 requires report but does not define format (JSON, CSV, Markdown). Specify output file format.
